text: Distance means so little when someone means so much.
author: Unknown

text: The pain of missing you is a beautiful reminder of the joy of having you in my life.
author: Unknown

text: True love doesn't mean being inseparable; it means being separated and nothing changes.
author: Unknown

text: I would rather share one lifetime with you than face all the ages of this world alone.
author: J. R. R. Tolkien

text: Distance is for those bold enough to spend a lot of time alone in exchange for a little time with the one they love.
author: Meghan Daum

text: Love knows no distance; it has no continent; its eyes are for the stars.
author: Gilbert Parker

text: We were together even when we were apart.
author: Unknown

text: No distance of place or lapse of time can lessen the friendship of those persuaded of each other's worth.
author: Robert Southey

text: Being apart teaches us how to be together.
author: Unknown

text: Long-distance love proves that a heart doesn't need to be near to be loyal.
author: Unknown

text: The simple lack of you is more to me than others' presence.
author: Edward Thomas

text: I carry the miles between us like a promise: every one of them ends with you.
author: Unknown

text: Someday soon there will be no goodbyes, just hellos that last forever.
author: Unknown

text: We may be miles apart, but I'll always be near you in every way that matters.
author: Unknown

text: Absence sharpens love; presence strengthens it.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: The best and most beautiful things in the world cannot be seen or touched — they must be felt with the heart.
author: Helen Keller

text: I close my eyes and the miles disappear; you're right here, always.
author: Unknown

text: A long-distance relationship is loving someone with your whole heart even when your arms can't reach them.
author: Unknown

text: Every mile between us is one more mile I'd gladly cross for you.
author: Unknown

text: We don't need to be in the same place to be on the same page.
author: Unknown

text: Loving you from a distance is still the easiest thing I've ever done.
author: Unknown

text: It's not the distance that's the enemy, but the endless wait until I hold you again.
author: Unknown

text: Same stars, same sky, same love — just a little more space in between for now.
author: Unknown

text: Two hearts in love need no words.
author: Unknown

text: The gap between us is temporary; the love is not.
author: Unknown

text: I fell in love with you, not your zip code.
author: Unknown

text: You're worth every mile, every time zone, and every lonely night in between.
author: Unknown

text: Distance gives us a reason to love harder.
author: Unknown

text: When you can't be next to the one you love, love the one you can't be next to even harder.
author: Unknown

text: Our love story has more chapters than miles, and that's saying something.
author: Unknown

text: Home is wherever you are, so lately I've been a little homesick.
author: Unknown

text: The miles keep us apart, but nothing keeps you off my mind.
author: Unknown

text: I'd rather count down the days to you than count up the reasons to give up.
author: Unknown

text: We're not apart; we're just loving each other from a little farther away.
author: Unknown

text: Long distance is hard, but so are diamonds — and both are worth it.
author: Unknown

text: Every night the distance feels bigger, and every morning my love for you feels stronger.
author: Unknown

text: One day the distance will close, and until then, my heart stays open.
author: Unknown

text: Missing you isn't proof that we're too far apart; it's proof that we belong together.
author: Unknown

text: Time zones can't schedule how much I miss you.
author: Unknown

text: The strongest love stories are the ones that survive the space between two people.
author: Unknown

text: You are worth waiting for, worth traveling for, and worth every quiet night alone.
author: Unknown

text: The distance is only physical; my heart never left your side.
author: Unknown

text: We're building a love that's stronger than the miles trying to test it.
author: Unknown

text: A goodbye at the airport is just a promise to say hello again.
author: Unknown

text: Someday "far away" will just be a chapter we survived together.
author: Unknown
